summary: Comprehensive coverage of core requirements (policies, cleanup plan, dry-run, error handling, end-to-end workflow), but brittleness in hardcoded act-test expectations tightly coupled to fixture data. Missing rigor: no tests for boundary conditions (exact-size matches), invalid inputs (negative/zero values), duplicate artifacts, or edge cases in policy composition (all three policies together). Good unit-test design with clear helpers and naming; integration-test expectations are hardcoded numbers rather than derived from fixture content, making them fragile to fixture changes. Would catch most regressions but risks false failures if test data is modified.
